scripts.build: npm run build -w @treemich/api && npm run build -w @treemich/web
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.test: npm run test -w @treemich/api && npm run test -w @treemich/web
scripts.lint: eslint . --max-warnings=0 && prettier --check . && npm run lint -w @treemich/api && npm run lint -w @treemich/web && npm run lint -w @treemich/shared
